workflow_rationale: New UI feature (settings popup) that touches UI layer + scene integration. Single Unity project but involves creating new popup class, fixing base class gap, and wiring into multiple scenes.

phases.name: Foundation - UI_Base Fix + Settings Popup Script
phases.description: Fix UI_Base missing GetSlider method and create the UI_SettingsPopup class following existing popup patterns (UI_HeroInfoPopup as reference)

subtasks.description: Add GetSlider helper method to UI_Base.cs. UI_Base already has BindSliders() but is missing the corresponding GetSlider() convenience method (like GetButton, GetText, GetToggle exist). Add: protected Slider GetSlider(int idx) { return Get<Slider>(idx); }

verification.expected: Line with protected Slider GetSlider(int idx)

subtasks.notes: Added `protected Slider GetSlider(int idx) { return Get<Slider>(idx); }` to UI_Base.cs at line 57, right after GetToggle, following the exact same one-liner pattern used by GetButton, GetText, GetImage, GetToggle.

subtasks.description: Create UI_SettingsPopup.cs - the main settings popup class. Follows UI_HeroInfoPopup pattern. Features: BGM volume slider (0-100%), SFX volume slider (0-100%), Vibration toggle, Close button. Uses SoundManager API for volume (SetBgmVolume/SetSfxVolume/SaveSettings). Vibration uses own PlayerPrefs key 'Settings_Vibration'. Slider.onValueChanged callbacks for real-time volume preview. SaveSettings on close.
subtasks.notes:
Created UI_SettingsPopup.cs following UI_HeroInfoPopup pattern exactly. Features:
- Extends UI_Popup
- enum GameObjects { CloseArea }, Buttons { CloseButton }, Texts { BGMValueText, SFXValueText }, Sliders { BGMSlider, SFXSlider }, Toggles { VibrationToggle }
- Init(): Binds all UI element types, sets up CloseArea/CloseButton click events, Slider.onValueChanged for real-time volume preview, Toggle.onValueChanged for vibration
- Refresh(): Loads current values from Managers.Sound (BgmVolume/SfxVolume) and PlayerPrefs (Settings_Vibration), updates sliders and text displays
- OnBGMSliderChanged/OnSFXSliderChanged: Call Managers.Sound.SetBgmVolume/SetSfxVolume for real-time preview, update value text (0-100%)
- OnVibrationToggleChanged: Saves to PlayerPrefs key 'Settings_Vibration'
- SaveAndClose(): Calls Managers.Sound.SaveSettings() + PlayerPrefs.Save() before closing popup
- No debug statements, clean code

phases.name: Scene Integration - Wire Popup to Buttons
phases.description: Connect settings popup to entry points: StartUpScene RecipeButton and GameScene SettingButton

subtasks.description: Modify UI_StartUpScene.cs - Change RecipeButton handler to open settings popup instead of starting single-player game. Replace OnClickRecipeButton body with: Managers.UI.ShowPopupUI<UI_SettingsPopup>(). NOTE: This replaces existing single-player start functionality on RecipeButton per spec requirement.
subtasks.notes: Replaced OnClickRecipeButton body in UI_StartUpScene.cs. Removed single-player start logic (GameMode.SetLocalTestMode + Scene.LoadScene) and replaced with Managers.UI.ShowPopupUI<UI_SettingsPopup>(). Verification grep passes. Committed as 54cd622.

subtasks.description: Modify UI_GameScene.cs - Wire SettingButton to open settings popup. Change OnClickSettingButton body from Debug.Log to: Managers.UI.ShowPopupUI<UI_SettingsPopup>(). This provides settings access from the old GameScene UI.
subtasks.notes: Replaced Debug.Log("OnClickSettingButton") with Managers.UI.ShowPopupUI<UI_SettingsPopup>() in UI_GameScene.cs. Follows same pattern as OnClickRecipeButton in UI_StartUpScene.cs. Verification grep passes.

phases.name: Prefab Setup - Unity Editor Manual Steps
phases.description: Document and prepare instructions for creating the UI_SettingsPopup prefab in Unity Editor. This phase requires manual Unity Editor work since prefabs are binary assets.

subtasks.description: Create PREFAB_SETUP.md with detailed instructions for creating UI_SettingsPopup prefab in Unity Editor. The prefab hierarchy must match the enum names exactly for UI_Base binding to work. Hierarchy: UI_SettingsPopup (Canvas) -> CloseArea (Image, transparent), Panel -> BGMSlider (Slider), SFXSlider (Slider), VibrationToggle (Toggle), CloseButton (Button), BGMValueText (TMP_Text), SFXValueText (TMP_Text). Prefab must be placed in Addressable group with 'PreLoad' label and key 'UI_SettingsPopup'.
subtasks.notes:
Created PREFAB_SETUP.md at Assets/@Scripts/UI/Popup/PREFAB_SETUP.md with comprehensive Unity Editor instructions:
- Full hierarchy: UI_SettingsPopup (Canvas) -> CloseArea, Panel -> BGMSlider, SFXSlider, VibrationToggle, CloseButton, BGMValueText, SFXValueText
- All child names match UI_SettingsPopup.cs enum values exactly (case-sensitive)
- Component configs: Sliders (min=0, max=1, wholeNumbers=false), Toggle, Button-TMP, TMP_Text
- CloseArea transparent overlay pattern matching UI_HeroInfoPopup
- Addressable setup: UI group, key 'UI_SettingsPopup', PreLoad label
- Canvas: 1080x1920 reference resolution (auto-configured by UI_Popup.Init)
- Verification checklist and enum reference section
- Committed as 9e498f2

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-foundation and modify different files

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Minimal - small task, sequential is fine

acceptance_criteria: UI_Base.cs GetSlider method added without breaking existing code
BGM/SFX volume changes apply in real-time via SoundManager
Settings persist after popup close (SaveSettings called)

verification_steps.name: Code Compilation Check
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Both files exist with expected content

verification_steps.name: Unity Compile Test
verification_steps.command: echo 'Open Unity Editor and verify 0 compilation errors'

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk UI-only change. No backend, no data migration, no security implications. Main risk is compile errors or missing prefab binding. Manual Unity Editor testing required for full verification.

steps: Open Unity Editor - verify 0 compilation errors
Play StartUpScene - click RecipeButton - settings popup should appear
Move BGM slider - verify volume text updates and audio changes in real-time
Move SFX slider - verify volume text updates and audio changes in real-time
Toggle vibration - verify toggle state persists
Click CloseButton or CloseArea - popup should close and settings should be saved
Re-open settings popup - verify previous slider/toggle values are restored
Stop and Play again - verify settings persist across sessions (PlayerPrefs)

tests_passed.static_analysis: All 8 acceptance criteria verified; SoundManager API 5/5 methods verified; Pattern compliance 10/10 checks passed; Security 0 issues

issues_found.title: Slider callback re-trigger during Refresh()
issues_found.fix_required: Optional optimization: remove/re-add listeners around value assignment in Refresh()
